matrix_decision.next_phase_purpose: Plan tiny guarded RPC shape smoke using the installed budget guard, still no provider call until explicit real approval.

evidence_matrix_rows.notes: Code existence must be verified by guarded chain source; missing evidence is not hard block.
Verification/trusted source evidence required before score/paper.
Unknown honeypot status cannot become clean risk.
Sellability cannot be inferred from liquidity only.
Use current trusted snapshot; no latest/global fallback leakage.
No router quote now; only plan matrix.
No holder distribution advancement before deployer/risk matrix.
Target6 bounded-empty is unresolved, not deployer absence.
MEV gate remains closed without evidence.
Freshness must be attached to every evidence row.
Missing outcome memory is not reject; it lowers confidence.

WAIT_MORE_DATA.condition: Any required evidence group missing, stale, untrusted, or unresolved.

HARD_BLOCK_ONLY_WITH_EXPLICIT_DANGEROUS_.condition: Confirmed dangerous evidence such as honeypot, sell fail, malicious deployer history, dangerous LP, extreme tax, or unacceptable impact.

WATCHLIST_ONLY_AFTER_REQUIRED_EVIDENCE.condition: Core identity/code/source/liquidity/deployer evidence sufficient but paper evidence not complete.

PAPER_MANUAL_CANDIDATE_ONLY_AFTER_FULL_R.condition: All required risk evidence present and clean enough with explicit entry/SL/TP evidence.

REJECT_ONLY_WITH_EVIDENCE.condition: Reject requires evidence, not missing data alone.
